how_it_works.title: Describe Your Salon
how_it_works.description: Name, services, specialists, and atmosphere — AI will understand the concept.

how_it_works.title: AI Generates the Website
how_it_works.description: Ready website with service catalog, prices, and booking form will appear in seconds.

how_it_works.title: Publish
how_it_works.description: Add work photos, set prices, and launch — clients are already looking for you.

faq.question: Can I add a service price list to the website?
faq.answer: Yes, in the builder you can easily create a service catalog with descriptions, prices, and categories.

faq.question: How does online booking for services work?
faq.answer: The booking form allows the client to select service, specialist, and convenient time — data comes to you.

faq.question: Is it suitable for a salon with multiple specialists?
faq.answer: Yes, you can add specialist profiles with their specializations, experience, and work photos.

faq.question: Will the salon appear in search engines?
faq.answer: Yes, websites are SEO-optimized — the salon will appear in city search results.

faq.question: How much does it cost to create a salon website?
faq.answer: You can create a website for free. Paid plans unlock custom domain and advanced features.

faq.question: Can I show specialist work photos?
faq.answer: Yes, the website has a gallery for work photos — add specialist portfolios and service examples.

cta_mid_subtitle: AI will generate a website with services, prices, and online booking — in 5 minutes.
cta_final_subtitle: Attract clients from the internet — create a website in 5 minutes.
